title: Vishahareswara Temple
tagline: Vishahareswara Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Vishahareswara Temple is a temple to Shiva in Thiruvarur district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: The Vishahareswara Temple is a temple to Shiva in Thiruvarur district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The temple was built in the early 9th century in the village of Kodandaramapuram, which later became part of Avanam Paruthiyur. It is situated on the banks of Kudamurutti River, a distributary of the Kaveri. The presiding deity of this temple is a form of Shiva called Vishahareswarar, and his consort Prasanna Parvathy Devi.

topPlaces.name: Adippuliyur
topPlaces.description: Adippuliyur is a village in the Kudavasal taluk of Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Sengalipuram
topPlaces.description: Sengalipuram ("Shivakalipuram") is a village situated in Thiruvarur district in the south Indian state of Tamil Nadu Notable people from the village include Sengalipuram Muthanna, Anantharama Deekshithar and the Tamil writer "Thiru". It is one of the 18 Vathima villages.

topPlaces.name: Perappadi
topPlaces.description: Perappadi is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Kudavasal taluk
topPlaces.description: Kudavasal taluk is a taluk in Tiruvarur district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Kudavasal.

topPlaces.name: Kudavasal
topPlaces.description: Kudavasal or Kodavasal is a panchayat in Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The town is the headquarters of Kudavasal taluk.

topPlaces.name: Kudavasal block
topPlaces.description: Kudavasal block is a revenue block in the Kudavasal taluk of Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 49 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Koneswarar Temple, Kudavasal
topPlaces.description: Koneswarar Temple (Tamil: குடவாசல் கோணேசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple in the town of Kudavasal in the Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Thirumeignanam Gnanaparameswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Thirumeignanam Gnanaparameswarar Temple (Tamil: திருமெய்ஞானம் ஞானபரமேஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Thirumeignanam in Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Gnanaparameswarar.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vishahareswara Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vishahareswara Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vishahareswara Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (89 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (90 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vishahareswara Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vishahareswara Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vishahareswara Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vishahareswara Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vishahareswara Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Adippuliyur, Sengalipuram, Perappadi, Kudavasal taluk, Kudavasal.
